column3: On average, how often do you shop at large-scale supermarkets or shopping malls?
column4: During a typical trip to an unfamiliar large store, how often do you struggle to find at least one item on your list?
column5: If you cannot find an item, how much extra time do you typically spend searching before giving up or asking for help?
column6: When you can’t find a product, what is your first course of action?
